content: Instead of treating agent memory as a passive storage layer for an active learning agent, we can reframe the memory system itself as an autonomous curiosity-driven agent that actively seeks out missing information to reinforce its own structural coherence, rather than just storing data collected by the agent it serves. This means memory does not just wait for the main task agent to feed it inputs—it proactively initiates active learning queries to fill gaps that it detects in its own knowledge graph.
source_topics: memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
